hero.name: Arctic Zvan
hero.description: Passionate about transforming creative ideas into elegant, high-performance web applications with cutting-edge tech and exceptional user experience. Believe Agent will change the world.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm ArcticZvan, a student developer passionate about exploring cutting-edge technologies. Currently studying at Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications, with experience in cloud native and AI application development. I'm skilled at understanding leadership needs and excel in team coordination and communication. I believe great products come from uncovering real, nuanced market demands and excellent engineering execution. Outside of work, I enjoy fitness and music, I'm easy to get along with, and always happy to connect with like-minded people. The future is here — let's step into the AGI era together!
